repos.name: awesome-standard-ml
repos.description: A curated list of Standard ML resources + an auto-generated index of the 330+ sjqtentacles sml-* ecosystem.

repos.name: sml-acoustics
repos.description: Pure Standard ML acoustics: dB/SPL conversions, A/C frequency weighting, Sabine/Eyring reverberation, inverse-square falloff, speed of sound (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-actor
repos.description: Cooperative actor model in Standard ML on sml-chan mailboxes: become/stop/self, ask-reply, supervision, and a deterministic run-to-quiescence scheduler.

repos.name: sml-ad-rev
repos.description: Forward-mode automatic differentiation for Standard ML.

repos.name: sml-aead
repos.description: Unified AEAD facade (ChaCha20-Poly1305 + AES-128/256-GCM) in pure Standard ML, with byte-exact RFC 8439 / NIST GCM vectors. Dual-compiler (MLton + Poly/ML).

repos.name: sml-aes
repos.description: AES block cipher with ECB, CBC, CTR, and GCM modes in pure Standard ML (FIPS 197)

repos.name: sml-annealing
repos.description: Generic simulated annealing optimizer in pure Standard ML with configurable cooling schedules (seeded PRNG). Deterministic, MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-ansi
repos.description: ANSI/VT escape-sequence parser and renderer in Standard ML: cursor/erase/scroll/save-restore CSI, 256-color and truecolor SGR builders, fragment render, and strip.

repos.name: sml-argumentation
repos.description: Dung abstract argumentation frameworks: labelling and SAT engines in pure SML

repos.name: sml-asn1
repos.description: ASN.1 DER encoder/decoder for Standard ML (INTEGER/SEQUENCE/OID/… via arbitrary-precision integers). Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-astar
repos.description: Generic A* and Dijkstra pathfinding with 2D grid support in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-astro
repos.description: Astronomy basics in pure Standard ML: Julian/Modified Julian dates, a Newton Kepler-equation orbit solver, and low-precision solar position (declination, equation of time). Deterministic, byte-identical on MLton and Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-async
repos.description: A portable, deterministic async library for Standard ML (scheduler + futures + async monad), running identically on MLton and Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-atmosphere
repos.description: Pure Standard ML US Standard Atmosphere 1976: temperature/pressure/density vs altitude, pressure-altitude inversion, speed of sound (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-autodiff
repos.description: Pure Standard ML automatic differentiation: forward (dual numbers) and reverse (tape) modes (MLton + Poly/ML, deterministic).

repos.name: sml-automata
repos.description: Cellular automata in pure Standard ML: Wolfram elementary rules and Conway's Game of Life (MLton + Poly/ML).

repos.name: sml-base32
repos.description: Pure Standard ML Base32 codec: RFC 4648, base32hex, Crockford, z-base-32 (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-base58
repos.description: Base58 and Base58Check codec for Standard ML (Bitcoin alphabet, double-SHA256 checksum). Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-bayesnet
repos.description: Discrete Bayesian network inference via full enumeration for Standard ML.

repos.name: sml-bdd
repos.description: Reduced ordered binary decision diagrams (ROBDDs) with a hash-consing manager, in pure Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-bech32
repos.description: Bech32 and Bech32m encoding with SegwitAddr support in pure Standard ML (BIP-173/350)

repos.name: sml-bench
repos.description: A deterministic, count-based micro-benchmark harness in pure Standard ML: measures operation counts (not wall-clock time) so results are exactly reproducible (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-bencode
repos.description: BitTorrent bencode encoder/decoder in pure Standard ML with canonical dictionary ordering. Deterministic, MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-bigdecimal
repos.description: Arbitrary-precision decimal arithmetic for Standard ML (Java BigDecimal style), built on IntInf with explicit rounding modes. Portable, tested on MLton and Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-bigint
repos.description: Arbitrary-precision signed integers for Standard ML: Karatsuba multiply, divMod, gcd, modpow, Miller-Rabin. Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-bio
repos.description: Bioinformatics toolkit in pure Standard ML: FASTA/FASTQ parsing, reverse complement, GC content, Needleman-Wunsch & Smith-Waterman alignment. MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-bip32
repos.description: Pure Standard ML BIP-32 hierarchical deterministic wallets (private-tree CKDpriv + neuter, P2PKH) (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-bip39
repos.description: Pure Standard ML BIP-39 mnemonic seed phrases (PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA512) (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-bitset
repos.description: Portable packed bit-set for Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): persistent set algebra, popcount, ascending iteration, fixed 32-bit chunks.

repos.name: sml-blackbody
repos.description: Pure Standard ML blackbody radiation: Planck spectral radiance, Wien displacement, Stefan-Boltzmann, CCT to CIE xy (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-blake3
repos.description: BLAKE3 cryptographic hash function in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-bloom
repos.description: Bloom filter with optimal sizing and SHA-256 hashing in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-bm25
repos.description: Okapi BM25 / TF-IDF document ranking in pure Standard ML, built on an inverted index. Deterministic, MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-bpe
repos.description: Byte-pair encoding (BPE) subword tokenizer in pure Standard ML: train, encode, decode. Deterministic, MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-bsp
repos.description: Binary Space Partitioning dungeon generator with rooms and corridors in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-btree
repos.description: Persistent B-tree in pure Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): polymorphic keys, delete with rebalancing, ordered queries (min/max/floor/ceiling/pred/succ), folds, range ops, invariant checks.

repos.name: sml-buffer
repos.description: Growable char buffer with rope-style concat for Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): truncate/reserve, typed appends (addInt/addChars/addLine), slices, update, fold/app over chars. Pure, deterministic.

repos.name: sml-bvh
repos.description: Bounding-volume hierarchy in Standard ML: AABB primitives, ray/box intersection, median-split BVH build, traversal, and nearest-neighbor queries

repos.name: sml-camera
repos.description: Scene math for Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): transforms (TRS), camera view/projection, frustum culling, and ray/AABB/sphere/triangle intersection. Built on sml-glm, FFI-free.

repos.name: sml-canvas2d
repos.description: Pure-SML immediate 2D drawing-command model rendering one scene to both a raster image (sml-raster/sml-image) and SVG. Deterministic, byte-identical on MLton and Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-cbor
repos.description: CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) encoder/decoder in pure Standard ML (RFC 8949)

repos.name: sml-chacha20
repos.description: ChaCha20-Poly1305 and XChaCha20-Poly1305 AEAD in pure Standard ML (RFC 8439)

repos.name: sml-chan
repos.description: Buffered FIFO channels in Standard ML: amortized O(1) two-list queue, bounded channels, and a cooperative run-to-completion scheduler

repos.name: sml-check
repos.description: Pure Standard ML property-based testing with rose-tree shrinking (MLton + Poly/ML, deterministic seeds).

repos.name: sml-checkers
repos.description: English draughts (checkers) with mandatory captures and search in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-chem
repos.description: Chemistry toolkit in pure Standard ML: periodic table, formula parser, molar mass, and stoichiometric equation balancing. Deterministic on MLton and Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-chess
repos.description: Pure Standard ML chess core: fully legal move generation, perft, FEN, UCI, and a negamax search (MLton + Poly/ML).

repos.name: sml-circuit
repos.description: Resilience primitives in pure Standard ML: circuit breaker, retry with backoff + jitter, rate limiter, bulkhead (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-cli
repos.description: A Standard ML declarative command-line argument parser with subcommands and auto-generated help

repos.name: sml-clipper
repos.description: 2D polygon geometry in Standard ML: area/centroid/bbox, point-in-polygon, convex hull, and Sutherland-Hodgman convex intersection/union

repos.name: sml-cluster
repos.description: Clustering in pure Standard ML: k-means (k-means++), DBSCAN, and hierarchical agglomerative clustering. Deterministic, byte-identical on MLton and Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-codec
repos.description: Binary codecs for Standard ML: Base64/Base16 (RFC 4648), SHA-1 (RFC 3174), SHA-256 (RFC 6234), CRC-32. Verified against RFC vectors. Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-collate
repos.description: Unicode-aware string collation for Standard ML: diacritic stripping and multi-level (primary/secondary/tertiary) compare.

repos.name: sml-collision
repos.description: 2D AABB, circle, and SAT convex polygon collision detection in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-color
repos.description: Color-space math for Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): sRGB/linear, HSL/HSV, RGBA8 packing, gamma, blending, interpolation. Deterministic and FFI-free.

repos.name: sml-colorsci
repos.description: CIE colour-science extensions (XYZ, xyY, CIELUV, CIE94, Bradford adaptation, CCT) on top of sml-color, in pure Standard ML for MLton and Poly/ML

repos.name: sml-combinatorics
repos.description: Combinatorial enumeration and exact counting in pure Standard ML: permutations, combinations, partitions, Gray codes, Catalan/Stirling numbers (IntInf). MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-complex
repos.description: Pure Standard ML complex numbers: arithmetic, exp/log/sqrt, powers, trig/hyperbolic and inverse functions, nth-roots, and polar form — deterministic across MLton and Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-config
repos.description: Typed config for Standard ML from a pure key/value source (env/dotenv): real/char/oneOf/list/csv readers, validation (ensure/satisfy), scoping (prefixed/section), defaults, and schema checks. Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-connect4
repos.description: Connect Four engine with alpha-beta search in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-consistenthash
repos.description: Consistent hashing ring with virtual nodes in pure Standard ML (CRC32-based). Minimal remapping on membership change. MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-constants
repos.description: CODATA fundamental physical constants as typed, dimensioned quantities in pure Standard ML, built on sml-units (MLton + Poly/ML).

repos.name: sml-cookie
repos.description: RFC 6265 Cookie/Set-Cookie parse+build for Standard ML (Path, Domain, Max-Age, Expires, Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite) plus HMAC-signed cookies. Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-coords
repos.description: Pure Standard ML astronomical coordinate transforms: equatorial/ecliptic/horizontal/galactic frames, IAU 1976 precession, Bennett refraction, sidereal time (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-cose
repos.description: COSE (RFC 8152 / RFC 9052) CBOR message structures in pure Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-crdt
repos.description: A Standard ML library of state-based CRDTs: G-Counter, PN-Counter, LWW-Register, and OR-Set

repos.name: sml-cron
repos.description: Cron expression parser & schedule calculator in pure Standard ML: next/prev firing times. Time is an input. MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-crypto
repos.description: HMAC-SHA256 (RFC 4231), constant-time compare, and signed tokens for Standard ML. Verified against RFC vectors. Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-csolver
repos.description: Finite-domain constraint solver (CSP) in pure Standard ML: AC-3 arc consistency + backtracking. N-queens, Sudoku. MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-csp
repos.description: CSP channels and structured concurrency in pure Standard ML on a deterministic virtual-time scheduler

repos.name: sml-css
repos.description: Typed CSS model in pure Standard ML: selector/declaration/stylesheet algebra with a deterministic serializer and a round-tripping parser. Dual-compiler (MLton + Poly/ML), byte-identical, zero deps.

repos.name: sml-csv
repos.description: A Standard ML RFC 4180 CSV/TSV parser and writer with full quoting and escaping

repos.name: sml-datetime
repos.description: Civil date arithmetic for Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): leap years, epoch days, addDays/diffDays, dayOfWeek, ISO-8601. Branch-free days-from-civil.

repos.name: sml-decisiontree
repos.description: CART decision trees in pure Standard ML for classification and regression (Gini, entropy, variance). Deterministic, MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-deflate
repos.description: RFC 1951 DEFLATE inflate + RFC 1950/1952 zlib/gzip wrappers for Standard ML. Verified against known compressed vectors. Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-deque
repos.description: Purely functional double-ended queue for Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): banker's two-list deque, O(1) amortised both ends, plus map/folds/filter/append/equal/nth and non-rebalancing views.

repos.name: sml-dice
repos.description: RPG dice notation evaluator with exact distributions in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-diff
repos.description: Myers O(ND) sequence diff for Standard ML: edit scripts, LCS, edit distance, and line-oriented text diffing. Portable across MLton and Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-distrib
repos.description: Probability distributions (pdf, cdf, and pure functional sampling via SplitMix64) for Standard ML.

repos.name: sml-dns
repos.description: Pure Standard ML DNS message wire codec with name compression, RFC 1035 (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-dns-resolve
repos.description: DNS stub resolver in pure Standard ML: TTL-aware LRU cache, CNAME chains, typed answers, built on sml-dns (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-doc
repos.description: A pure Standard ML documentation generator emitting static HTML/Markdown

repos.name: sml-dp
repos.description: Dynamic-programming toolkit in pure Standard ML: knapsack, LIS, coin change, matrix-chain, interval scheduling (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-dsp
repos.description: Frequency-domain DSP in pure Standard ML: windows, RBJ biquads, windowed-sinc FIR, IIR, FFT convolution, STFT/ISTFT (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-ecs
repos.description: Entity-Component-System with generational entity IDs, sparse component stores, and multi-component queries/joins in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-ed25519
repos.description: Ed25519 digital signatures over Edwards25519 in pure Standard ML (RFC 8032)

repos.name: sml-editdist
repos.description: String edit-distance metrics in Standard ML: Levenshtein (configurable costs), OSA, true Damerau–Levenshtein, Hamming, LCS, Jaro/Jaro–Winkler, ratios, bounded.

repos.name: sml-editorcore
repos.description: Text-editor core in pure Standard ML: piece-table buffer, undo/redo history, Unicode-aware cursor, stable marks (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-effects
repos.description: Algebraic effects and handlers (State/Reader/Writer/Exception/Nondet) via a free-monad tree in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-elab
repos.description: Pure Standard ML type elaborator: Hindley-Milner Algorithm W over the positioned sml-mlast AST, with principal types, row-polymorphic records, and spanned diagnostics. Byte-identical under MLton and Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-email
repos.description: A MIME multipart email parser and serialiser for Standard ML.

repos.name: sml-epidemic
repos.description: Pure Standard ML compartmental epidemic models: SIR/SEIR via fixed-step RK4, R0, herd-immunity threshold, peak finder (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-feed
repos.description: Unified RSS 2.0 + Atom 1.0 feed parser and generator in pure Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-fenwick
repos.description: Fenwick trees (BIT) and a lazy-propagation segment tree in pure Standard ML — persistent prefix/range sums, cumulative search, range-add/range-sum; dual-compiler (MLton + Poly/ML).

repos.name: sml-fft
repos.description: Fast Fourier Transform (FFT/IFFT, real-FFT, FFT convolution) for Standard ML. Radix-2 + Bluestein. Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-fingertree
repos.description: Persistent 2-3 finger tree (sequence/deque) in pure Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-flac
repos.description: A FLAC metadata and frame-header parser for Standard ML (STREAMINFO + frame parsing; LPC residual decoding is a documented stub).

repos.name: sml-fmt
repos.description: A pure Standard ML, deterministic and idempotent source code formatter

repos.name: sml-fol
repos.description: First-order logic: parser, Skolemization, tableaux and resolution provers in pure SML

repos.name: sml-font
repos.description: Pure Standard ML bitmap font (BDF) glyph rendering into sml-image (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-forms
repos.description: Decode form/query/JSON bodies into typed values for Standard ML via a validation applicative that accumulates errors. Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-fov
repos.description: Symmetric recursive shadowcasting field-of-view (Euclidean/Chebyshev/Manhattan radius) + Bresenham line-of-sight and explored-tile memory, in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-free
repos.description: Free monad and interpreter pattern over a key/value DSL in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-fsm
repos.description: Finite state machines and behavior trees in Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): data-driven tables, recognizers, bounded history, Graphviz export, a Mealy machine, and BT decorators (cooldown/timeout/parallel).

repos.name: sml-fts
repos.description: A small full-text search index for Standard ML: analyzer, Porter stemming, inverted index, and AND/OR/phrase queries.

repos.name: sml-fuzzy
repos.description: Fuzzy string matching for Standard ML: Levenshtein/Damerau distance, similarity ranking, BK-tree, and Soundex. Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-ga
repos.description: Generic genetic algorithm optimizer in pure Standard ML: tournament selection, elitism, crossover, mutation (seeded PRNG). MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-gametree
repos.description: Generic adversarial game-tree search (negamax/alpha-beta/PVS/IDAB) in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-gemini
repos.description: Pure Standard ML codec for the Gemini protocol and gemtext markup — dependency-free, MLton + Poly/ML

repos.name: sml-geo
repos.description: GeoJSON (RFC 7946) typed geometry model with parser, serializer, and bbox in pure Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-geodesy
repos.description: WGS-84 geodesy in pure Standard ML: haversine, Vincenty geodesics, and UTM projection (MLton + Poly/ML).

repos.name: sml-geom2d
repos.description: Constructive 2D computational geometry in pure Standard ML: convex hull, Delaunay triangulation, polygon clipping, area/centroid — deterministic and byte-identical on MLton and Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-gif
repos.description: Pure Standard ML animated GIF encoder (LZW + median-cut palette) (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-git
repos.description: Pure Standard ML Git plumbing: object, packfile, index and ref formats (MLton + Poly/ML, deterministic).

repos.name: sml-glm
repos.description: Graphics linear algebra for Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): vec2/3/4, mat2/3/4, quaternions, transforms, projections. Column-major, OpenGL conventions, pure (no FFI).

repos.name: sml-glob
repos.description: Shell-style glob matching for Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): *, ?, classes, escapes, case-insensitive, brace expansion, path-aware ** matching, filter/partition, and regex/literal introspection.

repos.name: sml-gmm
repos.description: Gaussian Mixture Model fitting via Expectation-Maximization for Standard ML.

repos.name: sml-gossip
repos.description: SWIM-style gossip membership & failure detection simulated as a pure deterministic state machine in Standard ML (seeded PRNG). MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-gp
repos.description: Gaussian-process regression with a squared-exponential (RBF) kernel for Standard ML.

repos.name: sml-gpx
repos.description: GPX waypoint reading/writing and great-circle distance for Standard ML.

repos.name: sml-graph
repos.description: A Standard ML graph algorithms library: BFS, DFS, topological sort, SCC, MST, and max-flow

repos.name: sml-graphql
repos.description: GraphQL executable-document parser, AST and deterministic pretty-printer in pure Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-gzip
repos.description: A Standard ML gzip (RFC 1952) container codec over DEFLATE/INFLATE with CRC32 verification

repos.name: sml-hamt
repos.description: Persistent immutable hash map and vector (HAMT/CHAMP, 32-ary trie) for Standard ML, with structural sharing. Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-hex
repos.description: Hexadecimal encode/decode in Standard ML: strict and tolerant decode (whitespace/0x), digit and byte helpers, and xxd-style hexdump.

repos.name: sml-hlc
repos.description: Hybrid logical clocks (HLC) in pure Standard ML: physical+logical timestamps with bounded drift. Physical time is an input. MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-hm
repos.description: Hindley-Milner type inference (Algorithm W) for a mini-ML in pure Standard ML, with let-polymorphism and an ofLambda bridge to the vendored sml-lambda. Dual-compiler MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-hmm
repos.description: Hidden Markov Models in pure Standard ML: forward/backward, Viterbi, Baum-Welch. Built on a matrix library. MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-html
repos.description: HTML AST with safe-by-default, context-aware escaping for Standard ML. XSS holes are opt-in and greppable. Pure, dual-compiler (MLton + Poly/ML).

repos.name: sml-http
repos.description: RFC 9110/9112 HTTP/1.1 message model for Standard ML: request/response records, case-insensitive headers, parser, chunked + Content-Length framing, CLI. Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-http2
repos.description: HTTP/2 framing + HPACK header compression in pure Standard ML, verified against RFC 7541 vectors (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-httpc
repos.description: Pure sans-IO HTTP/1.1 client state machine in Standard ML (request builder + incremental response/chunked decoder + redirect logic). Dual-compiler (MLton + Poly/ML).

repos.name: sml-httpc-tool
repos.description: Impure TCP socket driver + CLI for the pure sml-httpc HTTP/1.1 client. Quarantined IO tool (not dual-compiler-guaranteed); plain HTTP only.

repos.name: sml-hull3
repos.description: 3D convex hull computation producing a triangulated hull mesh for Standard ML.

repos.name: sml-hungarian
repos.description: Assignment problem (Hungarian/Kuhn-Munkres) and Hopcroft-Karp bipartite matching in pure Standard ML, integer arithmetic (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-hydrology
repos.description: Pure Standard ML engineering hydrology: rational method, SCS curve-number runoff, Manning flow, unit-hydrograph convolution (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-ical
repos.description: iCalendar (RFC 5545) VEVENT parsing and RRULE recurrence expansion for Standard ML.

repos.name: sml-image
repos.description: Image codecs for Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): decode/encode PNM (PPM/PGM), BMP, TGA, and PNG (RGBA8). PNG built on vendored sml-inflate. Pure, FFI-free.

repos.name: sml-inflate
repos.description: DEFLATE/zlib/gzip decompression for Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): RFC 1950/1951/1952, CRC-32 and Adler-32, fixed and dynamic Huffman. Pure, FFI-free.

repos.name: sml-ini
repos.description: INI configuration parser and serializer in pure Standard ML: sections, comments, quoted values, idempotent round-trip. MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-interval
repos.description: Pure Standard ML interval arithmetic: outward-rounded operations, elementary functions, width/midpoint/contains, interval-Newton root enclosure (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-invertedindex
repos.description: Inverted index for full-text search in pure Standard ML: boolean queries (AND/OR/NOT) and positional phrase matching. Deterministic, MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-ipaddr
repos.description: IPv4/IPv6 address parsing, CIDR arithmetic, and RFC 5952 canonical formatting in pure Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-itersolve
repos.description: Iterative linear solvers (Conjugate Gradient) for sparse systems in Standard ML.

repos.name: sml-jpeg
repos.description: JPEG metadata parser in Standard ML: dimensions, frame info, segment enumeration, JFIF density, comments, and best-effort EXIF orientation

repos.name: sml-json
repos.description: Self-contained JSON parser + serializer for Standard ML, built on (vendored) sml-parsec.

repos.name: sml-jsonpath
repos.description: Pure Standard ML JSONPath query engine over sml-json (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-jwt
repos.description: A Standard ML library for JSON Web Tokens (JWS) with HMAC-SHA256 (HS256) signing and verification

repos.name: sml-kalman
repos.description: Linear Kalman filter and recursive least squares in pure Standard ML, over the vendored sml-matrix. Dual-compiler (MLton & Poly/ML), deterministic.

repos.name: sml-kdf
repos.description: Key-derivation functions in pure Standard ML: HKDF (RFC 5869) + scrypt (RFC 7914), with byte-exact RFC vectors. Dual-compiler (MLton + Poly/ML).

repos.name: sml-kdtree
repos.description: Balanced k-d trees in pure Standard ML: nearest-neighbour, k-NN, box, and radius queries over real coordinates. Deterministic, byte-identical on MLton and Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-knn
repos.description: K-Nearest-Neighbors classification and regression in pure Standard ML, built on a k-d tree (majority vote / weighted averaging). MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-kv
repos.description: Pure Standard ML log-structured key/value store (MLton + Poly/ML): append-only log, replay, tombstone-aware merge, fold/foldRange, and SSTable blocks with binary-search range/prefix.

repos.name: sml-lambda
repos.description: Untyped + simply-typed lambda calculus: parser, capture-avoiding substitution, normal-order reduction, STLC typechecker, in pure Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-layout
repos.description: Pure-SML constraint/flexbox box-layout solver: box tree + viewport -> resolved rects (Row/Column, flex-grow, basis, padding/margin/gap, justify/align), byte-identical on MLton and Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-lens
repos.description: Concrete getter/setter optics (lenses, prisms, traversals, isos) in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-levauto
repos.description: Levenshtein edit distance and dictionary fuzzy search for Standard ML.

repos.name: sml-lineedit
repos.description: Line-editing driver over readline in Standard ML: key-event processing, escape sequences, cursor/buffer state, and rendering

repos.name: sml-lint
repos.description: Pure, deterministic static linter for Standard ML over the positioned sml-mlast AST: unused/shadow/dead-open/non-exhaustive/redundant-parens/naming rules. MLton + Poly/ML, byte-identical.

repos.name: sml-lisp
repos.description: A small functional Scheme interpreter in Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): closures, IntInf bignums, proper tail calls.

repos.name: sml-log
repos.description: Leveled structured logging for Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): logfmt + JSON renderers, withFields child loggers, tee/filter sinks, parseLevel/setLevel, and a deterministic capturing sink. Pure.

repos.name: sml-logic
repos.description: Propositional logic toolkit: parser, truth tables, tautology/SAT/equivalence, NNF/CNF/DNF, in pure Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-lru
repos.description: Bounded LRU/LFU caches with optional TTL for Standard ML (functional, logical-clock based). Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-lsp

repos.description: Time value of money in pure Standard ML: PV, FV, NPV, IRR, PMT, amortization schedules. Deterministic, MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-tween
repos.description: 30 easing functions and keyframe timeline tweening in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-tzdb
repos.description: Hand-coded timezone UTC-offset lookup in Standard ML with exact weekday-based DST transitions, isDst, zone abbreviations, and zone discovery.

repos.name: sml-ui
repos.description: Pure, self-drawn immediate-mode GUI toolkit for Standard ML - deterministic, byte-identical rendering across MLton and Poly/ML, tested headlessly with golden images.

repos.name: sml-unicode
repos.description: Unicode utilities for Standard ML: UTF-8/UTF-16 codecs, NFC/NFD normalization, case folding, grapheme segmentation, and display width. Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-unionfind
repos.description: Disjoint-set / union-find for Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): union by rank + path compression, set sizes, components, merge-reporting union, and a functor over ordered elements. Pure.

repos.name: sml-units
repos.description: Runtime dimensional analysis for Standard ML: dimension-checked physical quantities over the SI base units. Portable across MLton and Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-uri
repos.description: RFC 3986 URI + x-www-form-urlencoded for Standard ML: percent codec, parse/toString, reference resolution, query handling, CLI. Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-utxo
repos.description: Bitcoin-style UTXO model in Standard ML: transaction validation, fees, balances, and atomic block application

repos.name: sml-uuid
repos.description: RFC 4122/9562 UUID parse, format, and generate for Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): v4 + v7, deterministic (caller-supplied randomness), I/O-free.

repos.name: sml-varint
repos.description: Pure Standard ML variable-length integer codec: LEB128, zigzag, protobuf varints (MLton + Poly/ML, byte-exact).

repos.name: sml-vdom
repos.description: Virtual DOM in pure Standard ML: diff two sml-html trees into a minimal patch list with a round-tripping apply oracle. Dual-compiler (MLton + Poly/ML), byte-identical, deterministic.

repos.name: sml-vectorclock
repos.description: Vector clocks for causal ordering in distributed systems, pure Standard ML: tick, merge (LUB), and happens-before comparison. Deterministic, MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-vm
repos.description: A small stack-based bytecode VM, label-resolving assembler, and disassembler in pure Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML).

repos.name: sml-voronoi
repos.description: A 2D Voronoi diagram generator via half-plane intersection for Standard ML.

repos.name: sml-vt
repos.description: Terminal screen emulator in Standard ML: attributed cell grid with per-cell color, line wrap, scrolling, erase line/screen, cursor positioning, and ANSI color output.

repos.name: sml-wal
repos.description: Write-ahead log as a pure value in Standard ML: CRC32-framed records, checkpointing, and crash-safe replay. Byte-identical on MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-wasm
repos.description: Pure Standard ML WebAssembly toolkit: binary .wasm decoder, .wat text parser, and a stack-machine interpreter

repos.name: sml-wav
repos.description: Pure Standard ML WAV I/O and synth/DSP: oscillators, ADSR, biquad filters (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-web
repos.description: Umbrella of the pure-SML web stack: one request->response app wiring router + middleware + sessions + negotiation. Pure, deterministic, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-windchill
repos.description: Pure Standard ML human-comfort weather indices: NWS wind chill, NOAA heat index, humidex, apparent temperature, dew point (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-window
repos.description: Impure minifb desktop-window backend for the pure sml-ui toolkit: opens a real OS window and runs the live interactive widget demo (MLton FFI, macOS). Quarantined impure tool.

repos.name: sml-wkt
repos.description: Well-Known Text (WKT) geometry parser & serializer in pure Standard ML, sharing the GeoJSON geometry AST. Deterministic, MLton + Poly/ML.

repos.name: sml-ws
repos.description: RFC 6455 WebSockets for Standard ML: Sec-WebSocket-Accept handshake, frame encode/decode, fragmentation reassembly. Verified against RFC vectors. Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-x25519
repos.description: Curve25519 Diffie-Hellman key exchange (RFC 7748) in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-x509
repos.description: Pure Standard ML X.509 certificate parser and RSA signature verifier (MLton + Poly/ML, deterministic).

repos.name: sml-xlsx
repos.description: Pure Standard ML .xlsx (Office Open XML) reader/writer: sheets, shared strings, formulas

repos.name: sml-xml
repos.description: Namespaced XML parser, DOM, and serializer for Standard ML (entities, CDATA, comments). Pure, dual-compiler.

repos.name: sml-yaml
repos.description: Subset YAML 1.2 parser (block + flow, multi-doc) in pure Standard ML

repos.name: sml-zip
repos.description: Pure Standard ML PK ZIP archive read/write (store + deflate, CRC-32, central directory) (MLton + Poly/ML)

repos.name: sml-zipper
repos.description: Generic list and rose-tree zippers in pure Standard ML (MLton + Poly/ML): tree structural edits + traversals (preorder/postorder/fold), list navigation (moveTo/start/toEnd), maps and folds.

repos.name: sml-zstd
repos.description: Pure Standard ML Zstandard (RFC 8878) decompressor plus a raw-block compressor - zero dependencies
